task.title: Adopt ruffen docs in ty mdtests

rating.rationale: Agent completed the task fully autonomously with zero interventions, delivering a two-PR solution that both enables extension mapping in code block formatting and applies ruff formatting across all mdtest files. Communication is excellent — clear structure, rationale explained, patterns quantified. Minor dock: the solution spans two PRs which adds review overhead for a low-complexity task, though the separation is architecturally reasonable.
